NOTES: activation: learn Voc (running max), seed FOCV at first settled dwell, climb
safety first — sun lost kills tracking immediately
cv_regulate ignores the setpoint — freeze it for a later CC return
converged (noise-gated flats and boundary flips count; collapse/dip pushes do not)

NOTES: collapse escape: knee rose above the held band (sun got brighter) — step up and re-converge

GUARD: hold expired AND panel_limited AND charger in PRECHARGE/CC
NOTES: periodic re-probe — the upward path that recovers capability after clouds pass
